Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Binding Arb Pursuant To Contract And For Stay Of This Action
Off Calendar Jan-03-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Raquel Lacayo Valle of Chapman Popik & White, 352-3000, appearing for plaintiff and responding party
Gregory Gentile of Ropers Majeski, 408-287-6262, appearing for defendants and moving parties

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS NORMAN PEARCE and BTI GROUP, INC'S Motion To Compel Binding Arbitration Pursuant To Contract And For Stay Of This Action is granted. Waiver is not to be lightly inferred. Although defendants waited a long time before asserting right to arbitrate, the litigation machinery has not been substantially invoked since the only activity has been discovery to which defendants would have been entitled under the arbitration agreements and plaintiff has not been otherwise prejudiced. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
